auth.signInSubtitle: Use single sign-on if you are a Supabase teammate. Use your invitation email and password if you are a guest.
auth.needAccount: Need to create a guest account?

errors.invalidCredentials: That email and password do not match.
errors.weakPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.generic: Could not complete sign-in. Try again.

dev.subtitle: These buttons only appear locally. They sign you in as a seeded fixture so QA does not need to manage credentials.

tiles.registration: Finish your event registration step by step.
tiles.itinerary: Your flights, transfers, room, and sessions.
tiles.documents: Waiver, code of conduct, and travel guidance.
tiles.consent: Review and re-confirm any pending documents.
tiles.admin: Live reports, conflict resolution, and operations.

boundary.title: Something went wrong
boundary.description: An unexpected error occurred. Reload the page to try again.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.subtitle: Quick links to everything you can do here.
profile.comingSoon: Profile editing arrives in the next milestone.

community.comingSoon: Community lands in Phase 2: profiles, world map, group chat, and people-matching.

footer.rights: Powered by Supabase. Built with Kizuna.

registration.title: Registration
registration.errorSaving: We could not save your changes. Please try again.

personalInfo.preferredNameHint: How your name appears on your badge.
personalInfo.legalNameHint: Exactly as printed on your passport.

dietary.alcoholFree: Please do not serve me alcohol
dietary.severityHint: Anaphylactic risks are flagged to the kitchen.
dietary.notes: Anything else our kitchen should know

passport.intro: Your passport details are encrypted at rest and never visible to admins.
passport.issuingCountryHint: Two-letter ISO code (e.g. US, GB, CA).
passport.expiryWarning: This passport expires before the event ends. Please use a passport valid for at least six months past your travel.

children.intro: Add anyone aged 17 or under who will be travelling with you.

swag.noCatalogue: Swag will appear here once the event organisers publish the catalogue.

transport.intro: Tell us how you plan to arrive and depart so we can build the airport shuttle manifest.
transport.selfArranging: I am arranging my own transport.
transport.needsTransfer: I will need an airport transfer.

admin.title: Admin
admin.subtitle: Live operational data. Reports always render fresh, never frozen exports.
admin.blocked: You do not have permission to view this page.

itinerary.title: Your itinerary
itinerary.subtitle: Cached for offline. Updates push live when you have connectivity.
itinerary.empty: Nothing on your itinerary yet. Sessions and flights will appear here as they're confirmed.
itinerary.offline: You are offline. Showing the last cached schedule.

checkin.title: Check-in
checkin.subtitle: Show this code at registration to confirm your arrival.
checkin.noToken: Your check-in code will appear here once your registration is approved.

itinerary.conflict: Overlaps with another item on your day

guests.invitationSubtitle: Set a password to accept your guest invitation. The link expires seven days from when {{sponsor}} sent it.

errors.missingToken: This invitation link is missing its token. Ask {{sponsor}} to resend.
errors.expired: This invitation has expired. Ask the sponsoring employee to send a new one.
errors.badSignature: This invitation link is not valid. Please use the original email link.
errors.generic: We could not accept your invitation. Try again or contact support.

checkout.title: Confirm your spot
checkout.subtitle: We charge a flat fee that covers your accommodation, meals, and activities for the duration of Supafest.

documents.scrollToContinue: Scroll to the end to continue
documents.explicitCheckboxLabel: I have read and agree to the {{title}}
documents.versionBumped: This document has been updated. Please re-read and confirm.
documents.errorSaving: We could not record your acknowledgement. Please try again.
